name: AudioContext
description: Represents an audio-processing graph built from linked audio modules
notes: Core entry point for all Web Audio work

name: BaseAudioContext
description: Base definition for online and offline audio-processing graphs
notes: Parent class - not instantiated directly

name: OfflineAudioContext
description: Audio context that renders to an AudioBuffer rather than speakers
notes: Useful for pre-processing deity voice effects

name: AudioNode
description: Base interface for audio-processing modules in the audio graph
notes: Abstract base - all nodes inherit from this

name: AudioParam
description: Audio-related parameter that can be scheduled and automated over time
notes: Critical for smooth voice parameter changes

name: AudioParamMap
description: Map-like interface providing access to a group of AudioParam objects
notes: Used with AudioWorkletNode

name: AudioBuffer
description: Short audio asset stored in memory from decoded audio data
use_cases: Loading oracle audio clips|Sound effect playback
notes: Store deity voice samples and ambient sounds

name: PeriodicWave
description: Describes a periodic waveform shape for use with OscillatorNode
notes: Create unique sacred tone signatures

name: AudioDestinationNode
description: Final destination node representing the output device (speakers)
notes: Every audio graph ends here

name: MediaStreamAudioDestinationNode
description: Routes audio output to a WebRTC MediaStream instead of speakers
notes: Could stream processed deity voice

name: OscillatorNode
description: Generates periodic waveforms (sine/triangle/square/sawtooth/custom)
notes: Sacred frequency generation for rituals

name: AudioBufferSourceNode
description: Plays back audio data stored in an AudioBuffer
use_cases: Playing deity voice clips|Sound effects|Oracle readings
notes: Primary node for playing pre-recorded deity audio

name: MediaElementAudioSourceNode
description: Audio source from an HTML audio or video element
notes: Stream oracle readings from media elements

name: MediaStreamAudioSourceNode
description: Audio source from a live MediaStream (microphone/webcam)
notes: Capture user voice for oracle interaction

name: MediaStreamTrackAudioSourceNode
description: Audio source from a specific MediaStreamTrack
notes: More specific than MediaStreamAudioSourceNode

name: AudioScheduledSourceNode
description: Parent interface for audio source nodes with start/stop scheduling
notes: Abstract base for timed sources

name: ConstantSourceNode
description: Outputs a constant value signal useful for automation
notes: Useful for controlling multiple params simultaneously

name: GainNode
description: Controls the volume/amplitude of audio passing through it
notes: Essential for deity voice level control and crossfading

name: BiquadFilterNode
description: Simple low-order filter for highpass/lowpass/bandpass/notch/etc
notes: Shape deity voice tone - remove rumble or add presence

name: ConvolverNode
description: Performs linear convolution for reverb and acoustic space simulation
notes: Temple/cave reverb for immersive oracle experience

name: DelayNode
description: Delay-line that introduces time delay between input and output
notes: Ethereal echo effects for deity voices

name: DynamicsCompressorNode
description: Compresses loud signals to prevent clipping and normalize volume
notes: Normalize deity voice volume across different speakers

name: WaveShaperNode
description: Non-linear distortion using a curve-shaping function
notes: Add otherworldly texture to deity voices

name: IIRFilterNode
description: General infinite impulse response filter for custom frequency response
notes: Advanced filtering when BiquadFilter is insufficient

name: AnalyserNode
description: Provides real-time frequency and time-domain analysis data
notes: Critical for audio-reactive orb visuals and voice meters

name: PannerNode
description: 3D spatial positioning and panning of audio in 3D space
notes: Position deity voices in 3D space around the orb

name: StereoPannerNode
description: Simple stereo left/right panning of audio signal
notes: Quick stereo positioning for ambient sounds

name: AudioListener
description: Represents the position and orientation of the listener in 3D space
notes: Pairs with PannerNode for spatial audio

name: ChannelSplitterNode
description: Separates multi-channel audio into individual mono outputs
notes: Split channels for independent processing

name: ChannelMergerNode
description: Combines multiple mono inputs into a single multi-channel output
notes: Merge processed channels back together

name: AudioWorklet
description: Interface for loading custom audio processing modules
notes: Custom deity voice effects beyond built-in nodes

name: AudioWorkletNode
description: AudioNode that executes custom processing code via AudioWorklet
notes: Build bespoke voice transformation effects

name: AudioWorkletProcessor
description: Runs custom audio processing code in a separate thread
notes: Implement custom processing without blocking main thread

name: AudioWorkletGlobalScope
description: Global scope available inside AudioWorklet processing code
notes: Infrastructure for worklet registration

name: ScriptProcessorNode
description: DEPRECATED - Legacy JavaScript audio processing on main thread
notes: Deprecated - use AudioWorkletNode instead

name: Tone.js
description: Interactive music framework built on Web Audio API for creating music in the browser
use_cases: Music composition|Sound design|Interactive audio|Deity voice synthesis
notes: Best-in-class Web Audio abstraction; ideal for sacred soundscapes

name: Tone.Synth
description: Basic monophonic synthesizer with single oscillator and ADSR envelope
notes: Simple synth for oracle notification sounds

name: Tone.FMSynth
description: FM synthesis-based monophonic synthesizer for complex harmonic tones
notes: Rich harmonics for ritual ambient sound design

name: Tone.AMSynth
description: Amplitude modulation synthesis-based monophonic synthesizer
notes: Warm ambient tones for background soundscapes

name: Tone.NoiseSynth
description: Synthesizer using filtered noise as its sound source
notes: Ocean/wind ambient sounds for oracle environment

name: Tone.PolySynth
description: Wrapper enabling polyphonic (multi-note) playback from monophonic synths
notes: Sacred chord progressions for ritual ambience

name: Tone.Player
description: Loads and plays back individual audio files with scheduling
notes: Play deity voice recordings and oracle readings

name: Tone.Sampler
description: Multi-sample instrument with automatic pitch-shifting between notes
notes: Could map deity sounds to musical notes

name: Tone.Oscillator
description: Generates periodic waveforms with sample-accurate scheduling
notes: Sacred frequency drones (432Hz etc)

name: Tone.Noise
description: White/pink/brown noise generator
notes: Background texture for immersive environments

name: Tone.Distortion
description: Distortion audio effect with adjustable amount
notes: Subtle grit for underworld deity voices

name: Tone.Filter
description: Frequency-based audio filter with lowpass/highpass/bandpass modes
notes: Shape deity voice frequency content

name: Tone.FeedbackDelay
description: Delay effect with feedback loop for echo and rhythmic delay
notes: Ethereal echo for oracle voice delivery

name: Tone.Reverb
description: Convolution-based reverb effect for room/space simulation
notes: Temple reverb for deity voice presence

name: Tone.Chorus
description: Chorus effect for thickening and widening audio signals
notes: Add ethereal shimmer to deity voices

name: Tone.Phaser
description: Phaser effect creating sweeping notch-filter movement
notes: Otherworldly sweeping texture

name: Tone.Tremolo
description: Amplitude modulation effect for rhythmic volume pulsing
notes: Pulsing audio-reactive effects for orb

name: Tone.Vibrato
description: Pitch modulation effect for natural wobble
notes: Subtle voice warmth

name: Tone.EQ3
description: Three-band equalizer (low/mid/high)
notes: Quick deity voice tone shaping

name: Tone.Compressor
description: Dynamics compressor for volume normalization
notes: Normalize deity voice loudness

name: Tone.Limiter
description: Brick-wall limiter preventing signal from exceeding threshold
notes: Protect speakers from deity voice peaks

name: Tone.Gain
description: Utility gain node for signal routing and volume control
notes: Basic signal routing in audio chains

name: Tone.Transport
description: Global transport for synchronizing and scheduling musical events
notes: Synchronize ambient sound layers and transitions

name: Tone.Loop
description: Creates looped callback events synchronized to the Transport
notes: Loop ambient sound patterns

name: Tone.Sequence
description: Step sequencer for creating patterns of events
notes: Sequence deity sounds in ritual patterns

name: Tone.Part
description: Schedule an array of events along a timeline
notes: Arrange multi-layer soundscapes

name: Tone.Meter
description: Audio level meter for monitoring signal amplitude
notes: Drive orb visual intensity from audio level

name: Tone.FFT
description: Fast Fourier Transform analyzer for frequency spectrum data
notes: Feed frequency data to orb visual shaders

name: Tone.Waveform
description: Time-domain waveform analyzer for oscilloscope-style display
notes: Waveform-driven orb animations

name: Tone.Channel
description: Channel strip with volume and panning controls
notes: Mix deity voice with ambient sounds

name: howler.js
description: Audio library for modern web with cross-browser support and simple API
notes: 7KB gzipped; great for simple oracle audio playback

name: Howl
description: Core howler.js object representing an individual sound instance
notes: Per-sound configuration and control

name: Howler
description: Global howler.js controller managing codec detection and global settings
notes: Global volume and mute controls

name: Pizzicato.js
description: Simplified Web Audio API library with clean short API and built-in effects
notes: Good for rapid prototyping audio effects

name: SoundJS
description: Audio management library from CreateJS suite for loading and managing sounds
notes: Part of CreateJS suite; good for asset management

name: Tuna
description: Easy-to-use audio effects library for Web Audio API
notes: Simple effects API compatible with Web Audio nodes

name: Wad
description: Audio manipulation library with effects/filters/panning/microphone support
notes: Includes all Tuna effects plus microphone input

name: virtual-audio-graph
description: Declarative React-inspired API overlay for Web Audio API state management
notes: 2.4KB; React-like approach to audio graph management

name: Theresas-Sound-World
description: Modular low-level Web Audio API method library (TSW)
notes: Fine-grained control with simpler API than raw Web Audio

name: XSound
description: Batteries-included library for audio management/loading/streaming/effects/visualization
notes: Comprehensive all-in-one audio library

name: Wavesurfer.js
description: Audio waveform visualization and interaction library
notes: Visualize oracle readings waveform; interactive scrubbing

name: peaks.js
description: Browser-based audio waveform visualization from BBC
notes: BBC-built; excellent for audio editing interfaces

name: Amplitude.js
description: Open-source HTML5 audio player library with no dependencies
notes: Clean player UI for oracle reading playback

name: Musquito
description: Tiny vanilla JavaScript audio library using Web Audio API
notes: Minimal footprint for simple audio needs

name: Tone.Panner
description: Stereo panning wrapper in Tone.js
notes: Position deity voices in stereo field

name: Tone.Panner3D
description: 3D spatial audio panner in Tone.js
notes: Position deity voices in 3D space around user

name: Tone.Convolver
description: Convolution reverb effect using impulse response buffers
notes: Load temple/cave impulse responses for deity ambience

name: Tone.AutoFilter
description: LFO-driven filter for automatic sweeping filter effects
notes: Rhythmic filter sweeps for audio-reactive visuals

name: Tone.AutoPanner
description: LFO-driven automatic stereo panning
notes: Sound that moves around the orb automatically

name: Tone.AutoWah
description: Envelope-following auto-wah filter effect
notes: Creative voice effect option

name: Tone.BitCrusher
description: Bit depth reduction effect for lo-fi digital distortion
notes: Glitchy digital effects for tech-deity aesthetic

name: Tone.PitchShift
description: Real-time pitch shifting without changing playback speed
use_cases: Voice pitch change|Gender shifting|Deity voice modulation
notes: Shift deity voice pitch for different characters

name: Tone.FrequencyShifter
description: Shifts all frequencies by a fixed amount (not pitch-preserving)
notes: Alien/otherworldly sound design

name: Tone.LFO
description: Low-frequency oscillator for modulating other parameters
notes: Drive rhythmic modulation of orb visual parameters

name: Tone.Envelope
description: ADSR envelope generator for shaping signal amplitude over time
notes: Shape how oracle sounds emerge and fade

name: Tone.AmplitudeEnvelope
description: Envelope connected to a gain node for volume shaping
notes: Smooth fade-in/out for deity voice clips

name: Tone.CrossFade
description: Crossfade between two audio inputs
notes: Smooth transition between deity voices or ambient layers

name: Tone.Split
description: Split a stereo signal into two mono signals
notes: Split for independent L/R processing

name: Tone.Merge
description: Merge two mono signals into a stereo signal
notes: Combine processed channels back to stereo

name: Tone.Recorder
description: Record audio from any Tone.js node to a blob
notes: Record oracle reading sessions for playback

name: Tone.Signal
description: Chainable audio-rate signal for parameter automation
notes: Audio-rate parameter control for smooth transitions

name: Tone.MonoSynth
description: Monophonic synthesizer with filter and filter envelope
notes: Rich filtered tones for ritual soundscapes

name: Tone.DuoSynth
description: Two-voice synthesizer with shared vibrato
notes: Layered deity ambient tones

name: Tone.PluckSynth
description: Karplus-Strong plucked string synthesis
notes: Ancient lyre/harp sounds for Greek mythology theme

name: Tone.MembraneSynth
description: Drum-like synthesis using a pitched membrane model
notes: Ritual drum sounds and impact effects

name: Tone.MetalSynth
description: Metallic percussion synthesis (cymbals/gongs/bells)
notes: Sacred bell and gong sounds for ritual transitions
